'''Ras''' was a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] of [[Ion Team]] in the [[22nd Air Combat Wing]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
Ras, the spec-three of [[Ion Team]], served as the squad's munitions expert. Ras served alongside [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Roan Shryne]] during the [[Battle of Murkhana (Clone Wars)|Battle of Murkhana]]. Along with his companions [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Climber (clone)|Climber]], [[Trace (clone)|Trace]], and [[Ion Team's spec-one|another commando]], Ras helped ambush [[Clone Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Salvo (clone trooper)|Salvo's]] attempt to carry out [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], saving [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Shryne, [[Bol Chatak]], and her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Olee Starstone]] from execution. He was later captured along with the rest of his squad and taken to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].<ref name="Rise of Vader" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ras appeared in the [[2005]] novel, ''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]''.<ref name="Rise of Vader" />
